


Prepare annotated table of fixated variants for karin:

```{r}

# first read in the annotated variant data from appropriate script




for (virus_line in unique(variants_ann$exp_line)){
  print(virus_line)
  for (mut in unique(variants_ann$mut_info[variants_ann$mut_cat == "Fixated" & variants_ann$exp_line == virus_line])){
      emergence_psg <- min(variants_ann$passage[variants_ann$exp_line == virus_line & variants_ann$mut_info == mut & variants_ann$allele_freq >= 0.01])
      fixation_psg <- min(variants_ann$passage[variants_ann$exp_line == virus_line & variants_ann$mut_info == mut & variants_ann$allele_freq >= 0.99])

      variants_ann$emergence_passage[variants_ann$mut_info == mut & variants_ann$exp_line == virus_line] <- emergence_psg
      variants_ann$fixation_passage[variants_ann$mut_info == mut & variants_ann$exp_line == virus_line] <- fixation_psg
  }

}
variants_ann_fixated <- 
            variants_ann %>%
            filter(allele_freq >= 0.99) %>%
            filter(genomic_pos != 3086) %>%
            mutate(allele_freq = round(allele_freq,3))





variants_ann_fixated <- variants_ann_fixated[,-match(c("chrom", "loss_of_function", "nonsense_mediated_decay", "mut_3_context", "mut_5_context", "mut_info"), colnames(variants_ann))]
variants_ann_fixated <- variants_ann_fixated[,c("exp", "host_line", "exp_line", "passage", "coverage", "variant_id", "genomic_pos", "ref_allele", 
                                                "alt_allele", "mut_type", "allele_freq", "mut_cat", "feature_id", "feature", "feature_range", "ORF", "annotation_id", "impact", "effect", "aa_change", "loc_in_cds", "loc_in_protein", "mut_context", "emergence_passage", "fixation_passage")]

sum(variants_ann_fixated$coverage < 500)
datatable(variants_ann, filter = "bottom")

write.table(variants_ann_fixated, file = "/Users/alimos313/Desktop/fixated_variants_ann_2.csv", sep = ",", row.names = F)




```
